creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #84)
> Adding "CXXFLAGS+=-std=c++11" to fix the build on 14-CURRENT.

Btw, if it is possible and the port's configure or make system accepts it, please use USE_CXXSTD= instead, as it is more or less the standard way.

Also, in most cases I have used gnu++11 or gnu++14, since many programs are (silently or not) dependent on GNU extensions.
